name: accounting firms managing 10–50 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–50 clients, daily reconciliation pain causes cash flow gaps. We automate bank statement matching instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Daily reconciliation of bank statements with internal ledgers is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Daily reconciliation of bank statements with internal ledgers is time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms managing 10–50 clients, daily reconciliation pain causes cash flow gaps. We automate bank statement matching instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
